response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. C++ exposure is limited to a brief 7-month stint at National Instruments (2014-2015) — far short of the required 5-10 years. There is no evidence of Windows-platform C++ development at scale, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain background. The skill stack centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, which do not align with this engagement.
strengths: Solid software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development experience
Long track record (15+ years) of professional software development across diverse domains
Strong communication skills demonstrated through workshops, talks, and teaching engagements
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, well below the required 5-10 years
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle experience; SQL listed generically with MySQL focus
Zero capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or Summit platform exposure

key_factors.factor: No financial services / capital markets domain
Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows platform depth
